headline: 1 Unpopular Stock That Deserves a Second Chance and 2 We Brush Off
summary: When Wall Street turns bearish on a stock, it’s worth paying attention. These calls stand out because analysts rarely issue grim ratings on companies for fear their firms will lose out in other business lines such as M&A advisory.

headline: Illinois Tool Works (NYSE:ITW) Emerges as a Top-Tier Dividend Stock Through Rigorous Screening
summary: ITW stock offers a reliable dividend with strong growth, backed by top-tier profitability and a solid industrial business model for long-term income investors.
